records.m_Talk_FRA: But who would do that in the middle of Ground One?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Found you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: T-this trauma-triggering voice is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It is Credere, the kind and the compassionate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It is Credere, the kind and the compassionate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It is Credere, the kind and the compassionate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry for the delay, Yuppie. It took a while to take care of some things.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry for the delay, Yuppie. It took a while to take care of some things.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry for the delay, Yuppie. It took a while to take care of some things.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Credere? How did you get here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Credere? How did you get here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Credere? How did you get here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Credere is here to apologize to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Credere is here to apologize to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Credere is here to apologize to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Credere didn't intend it, but Credere was a nuisance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Credere didn't intend it, but Credere was a nuisance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Credere didn't intend it, but Credere was a nuisance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why you sneaked in here? This is prison!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why you sneaked in here? This is prison!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why you sneaked in here? This is prison!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm okay, so go back. There seems to be something going on here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm okay, so go back. There seems to be something going on here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm okay, so go back. There seems to be something going on here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. Credere has to apologize to Yuppie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. Credere has to apologize to Yuppie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. Credere has to apologize to Yuppie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm really fine. We can talk later.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm really fine. We can talk later.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm really fine. We can talk later.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Credere destroyed all the cells because Credere didn't know where Yuppie was.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Credere destroyed all the cells because Credere didn't know where Yuppie was.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Credere destroyed all the cells because Credere didn't know where Yuppie was.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The great escape plan became the great prison break plan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The great escape plan became the great prison break plan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The great escape plan became the great prison break plan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha! We're free!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha! We're free!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Destroy everything! We're taking revenge on the bastards who have been oppressing us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was YOUR DOING?!

records.m_Talk_FRA: That was YOUR DOING?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Credere is cute, so let's move on. Honestly, this is partly your fault.
